data - Class in LeidenUniv.Tracking

Happens on changing the selection in the genericdialog to select the correct dataset.

Draw_Channels() - Method in class LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
Draws the current overlay on all subsequent channels
Draw_Frames() - Method in class LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
Draws the current overlay on all subsequent frames
Draw_Slices() - Method in class LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
Draws the current overlay on all subsequent slices in the Z-stack
drawTillEnd_ - Class in LeidenUniv.Tools
Plugin for drawing in an overlay element from current frame till the last one Useful for making movies with arrows
drawTillEnd_(ImagePlus) - Constructor for class LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
this can be called from a plugin
drawTillEnd_() - Constructor for class LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
Normal constructor used when the plugin is activated
